# The Darkest Dungeon

Monsters: Eldritch horrors (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Eldritch%20horrors%209d977fe97699437880fbc4b55651f78c.md), Zombies (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Zombies%20901eef0e94024304bb9512fee842e3b3.md), Beasts (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Beasts%203fefb3b547bb4b4985c3ef149b16290a.md)
Motivations: Cosmic horror (../../Features/Cosmic%20horror%207015e32dadb042b995663e84d5b48388.md), Adventure (../../Features/Adventure%201d458e628ba28026830dfe3db74cba19.md)
Pacing: Weeks (../Pacing%20types/Weeks%20948903aabaff4071b42a7005cbe643f6.md)
Story scale: Extended story (../Story%20scales/Extended%20story%2086324f5585d84ca0a6a36deafd6b91fc.md)
Traversal reasons: Missions (../Traversal%20reasons/Missions%2008ea5af920c149058a9ce4a2b3d0a098.md)
Traversal types: Stationary (../Traversal%20types/Stationary%2019344185392b46c7bd17f5017474cc1d.md), Roaming (../Traversal%20types/Roaming%201c6d9213c2aa449390613c20f6f4d71d.md)
Type: Game (../Inspiration%20types/Game%20e6c8c5e7a11041e4a5ae321253aa3392.md)
Weighted Use: 3
Wonder: 1

<aside>
💡 This is a visual inspiration for [Dark forest](../../Features/Dark%20forest%20181a3aae0f4b4056b6c28bb49e27978e.md), but doesn’t really add any narrative fuel.
